ops.title: spawnllm backend selection — PATH must include ~/.local/bin or it falls back to codex; enrich routes to codex by 'review' specialty
ops.body:
**Backend auto-selection (the recurring operational gotcha).** spawnllm's
`select_backend()` walks a PRIORITY list (`claude, codex, antigravity, gemini`) and
returns the first whose `check_status` is `BackendReady`, i.e. its binary is on PATH +
authed. The `claude` binary lives at `~/.local/bin/claude`, which is NOT on the
non-interactive Bash shell's PATH by default — so `shutil.which("claude")` fails and
spawnllm silently falls back to **codex**, which (when its structured path or auth is
broken) returns empty stdout → every verdict fails with a pydantic "EOF while parsing"
ValidationError. **Fix: prefix every cc-pushback LLM command with
`PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"`** (shell state doesn't persist across Bash tool calls,
so set it inline each time).

**Backend routing differs by stage.** The judge/refine call `default_backend()` =
`select_backend()` with no specialty → **claude** (general). But enrich's
correction-picker calls `usable_backend()` = `select_backend(specialty="review")`,
which the registry routes to **codex** (`LLM_BACKENDS = {debugging: codex, review:
codex, general: claude}`). So enrich needs `codex` separately authed (`codex login`);
`codex login status` can say "Logged in using ChatGPT" while the refresh token is
revoked (real calls 401). Verify with a one-row extraction, not the status command.

**Structured output is a single result-envelope.** Conceptually unchanged across the
0.1→0.4 (`RunSpec`/`run`) → 0.5 (`run`/`call`/`extract`) API migrations: the CLI emits
one `{"type":"result", ..., "structured_output":{...}}` object and the backend's
`parse_response(stdout, model)` validates it. The claude backend is stdout-based; the
codex backend (`codex exec`) writes its result to a `-o` file, which historically
mismatched cc-transcript's stdout-reading `run_structured_on` (fixed in the
spawnllm-0.5 / cc-transcript-7 migration, cc-pushback 0.7.0).

Historical (spawnllm 0.1.x, now fixed): `CLAUDE_CODE_SIMPLE=1` in `env()` broke
claude.ai keychain auth; `parse_structured_output` only scanned JSON lists not the dict
envelope. See [[cc-pushback-two-stage-pipeline]].
